VAT on household electricity bills will be cut from 5% to zero from 1 October, saving a typical household about £45 a year, funded by savings from the cancellation of the digital ID programme which was going to cost £1.8bn over the next three years.

A mayor in the Mexican state of Morelos, Valentin Lavin Romero, was shot dead in his town hall in Temoac after surviving a previous assassination attempt in January - he is the 14th mayor murdered since President Claudia Sheinbaum took office in October 2024.
